indicators.name: marble floor
indicators.rationale: Marble floors can be slippery and difficult to walk on, potentially causing distractions and discomfort.

indicators.name: elevator doors
indicators.rationale: Elevator doors can be a source of noise and interruptions, especially if the elevator is in use.

indicators.name: high-traffic area
indicators.rationale: The presence of elevators and a high-traffic area suggests this is a public space, not suitable for focused solo work.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height, making it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The marble floor and high-traffic area create potential distractions and discomfort, while the lack of a flat work surface makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation. Elevator doors could also introduce noise and interruptions, further reducing the suitability for focused solo work.
